## Plan reference

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-facing functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change with no behavior difference
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] infra — IaC / GitOps / Helm / CI
- [ ] test — added or modified tests
- [ ] chore — repo hygiene

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit message in PR title.
- [ ] Tests added / updated and passing locally.
- [ ] Lint, format, and type-check pass.
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Plan(s) updated where the design changed.
- [ ] Security review performed if touching `iam`, `billing`, `security`, host-agent, or edge-proxy.
- [ ] Breaking-change implications considered (DB migrations, API versions, env vars).
